original_title: HUNT-845 No way! My sister's friend turns an aphrodisiac and drinks it! ?? Even though I got the aphrodisiac I longed for, I'm a small-minded person who is stubborn and can't use it forever. Why did my sister (Ria Mitsuru, who plays with friends every day and makes me a fool) playfully take out an aphrodisiac from my room and drink it with my friends! ??
overview: An aphrodisiac that I got but never used. My sister, who usually makes me foolish about such secret items, doesn't work like this anyway! I took it out secretly and swirled it with my friends. However, the effect is outstanding and all the friends including my sister are in a super horny state! And before I knew what it was, my Ji-Po was asked and I was in a super harem yaritin state!
title: HUNT 845
